message:
fix: normalize hook show targets and prefer hooked bead over stale agent hook

Resolves shorthand polecat targets (rig/name -> rig/polecats/name) in
hook show, and changes polecat state derivation to prefer work beads
with status=hooked+assignee over potentially stale agent hook_bead.

Co-Authored-By: kirtangajjar <kirtangajjar@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
